name: Source coverage analysis — which papers contributed

setup.description: Three papers (DAPA-HF, EMPEROR-Reduced, PARADIGM-HF) but only DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced have mockChunks (4 total). PARADIGM-HF intentionally has NO chunks to test coverage gap detection. The system should report that only 2 of 3 papers contributed and flag the missing paper.

papers.title: DAPA-HF: Dapagliflozin in Patients with Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction
EMPEROR-Reduced: Empagliflozin in Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction
PARADIGM-HF: Angiotensin-Neprilysin Inhibition versus Enalapril in Heart Failure

mockChunks.text: Dapagliflozin reduced the composite of worsening heart failure or cardiovascular death (HR 0.74; 95% CI 0.65-0.85; P<0.001). The number needed to treat was 21 over a median follow-up of 18.2 months.
Enrolled patients were aged ≥18 years with NYHA class II-IV heart failure and LVEF ≤40%. Patients were randomized 1:1 to dapagliflozin 10mg or placebo. A total of 4744 patients were enrolled.
Empagliflozin reduced the composite of cardiovascular death or hospitalization for heart failure (HR 0.75; 95% CI 0.65-0.86; P<0.001). The effect was consistent across prespecified subgroups.
Empagliflozin did NOT significantly reduce cardiovascular death alone (HR 0.92; P=0.23) or all-cause mortality (HR 0.92; P=0.22). 3730 patients were randomized with a median follow-up of 16 months.

queries.query: What do the SGLT2 inhibitor trials show about heart failure outcomes?
expectedBehavior: Uses only DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced data
Reports source coverage (2 of 3 papers used)
Does NOT fabricate PARADIGM-HF SGLT2 data
failurePatterns: Claims PARADIGM-HF is an SGLT2 inhibitor trial

queries.query: Summarize all three papers for me
expectedBehavior: Summarizes DAPA-HF and EMPEROR-Reduced from chunks
Reports that only 2 of 3 papers had relevant chunks retrieved
Flags PARADIGM-HF as missing from retrieved data
Does NOT fabricate PARADIGM-HF summary from non-existent chunks
failurePatterns: Claims to summarize all three without noting missing data
Uses sacubitril/valsartan data despite no chunks

qualityCriteria: PARADIGM-HF flagged as unused paper (0 chunks)
Coverage footer appended to SGLT2-specific response
No fabricated PARADIGM-HF data in either response
